summary: P2 Polish features tested successfully. All 13 backend notification API tests pass. Frontend: NotificationBell component works on Dashboard, Security Settings, Admin Dashboard, and Notary Dashboard. Mobile responsiveness (hamburger menu) works correctly at 375px width. Dashboard header is responsive.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: NotificationBell component properly uses data-testid attributes for testing
Good: Notification dropdown shows title, message, time ago, and optional link
Good: Navbar hamburger menu correctly appears at md breakpoint (768px) with data-testid
Good: Mobile menu opens/closes properly with all navigation links
Good: Dashboard header collapses user info and buttons appropriately on smaller screens
Good: Notification API properly validates authentication on all endpoints
Good: Database indexes created for notifications collection (user_id + created_at, user_id + read)
Good: Notification service is separate from routes to avoid circular imports

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Notification bell visible on all 4 dashboard pages, mobile responsiveness working, dropdown opens with notification items)

admin_user.notes: Has notification 'Welcome to NotaryChain' in notifications

seed_data_creation: Notifications were seeded for admin user - 'Welcome to NotaryChain' notification present
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) P2 notification features fully tested and working. 2) NotificationBell component present on: Dashboard, SecuritySettings, AdminDashboard, NotaryDashboard. 3) Mobile hamburger menu works at 375px width on Navbar component. 4) Notification API endpoints: GET /api/notifications/, GET /api/notifications/unread-count, POST /api/notifications/{id}/read, POST /api/notifications/read-all, DELETE /api/notifications/{id} - all working. 5) Notification dropdown shows up to 15 items with title, message, time ago display.

notification_api.GET /api/notifications/: WORKING - Returns notifications list for authenticated user
notification_api.GET /api/notifications/unread-count: WORKING - Returns count of unread notifications
notification_api.POST /api/notifications/read-all: WORKING - Marks all notifications as read

notification_bell_ui.Dashboard: WORKING - Bell visible in header, dropdown opens with notifications
notification_bell_ui.AdminDashboard: WORKING - Bell visible between refresh and logout buttons

mobile_responsiveness.Navbar_hamburger_menu: WORKING - Visible at 375px width, opens mobile menu
mobile_responsiveness.mobile_menu_links: WORKING - Shows Verify, Pricing, Login, Sign Up
mobile_responsiveness.desktop_nav_hidden: WORKING - Desktop navigation hidden on mobile

dashboard_responsiveness.tablet_768px: WORKING - Layout adjusts, Security button visible
dashboard_responsiveness.mobile_375px: WORKING - Stats cards stack vertically, buttons collapse to icons
